sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ جُزْءاً هَامّاً مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا اليَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija postala je važan dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence has become an important part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ فِي الهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ وَالحَوَاسِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Ovu tehnologiju koristimo u pametnim telefonima i računarima.
sentences.translationEn: We use this technology in smartphones and computers.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ البَرَامِجُ الجَدِيدَةُ الطُّلَّابَ فِي دِرَاسَتِهِمْ وَأَبْحَاثِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Novi programi pomažu studentima u njihovim studijama i istraživanjima.
sentences.translationEn: New programs help students in their studies and research.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّ بَعْضَ الخُبَرَاءِ يَخَافُونَ مِنْ فُقْدَانِ الوَظَائِفِ.
sentences.translation: Međutim, neki stručnjaci strahuju od gubitka poslova.
sentences.translationEn: However, some experts fear the loss of jobs.

sentences.arabic: سَوْفَ تَتَغَيَّرُ طَرِيقَةُ العَمَلِ فِي المُسْتَقْبَلِ بِسَبَبِ التَّطَوُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Način rada će se promijeniti u budućnosti zbog razvoja.
sentences.translationEn: The way of working will change in the future because of development.
